title: Section 9
content: (1) On such date as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint a Board of Advisers to advise and assist the Administrator in carrying on the management of the specified undertaking. (2) The composition, term of office of the Advisers, the fees and allowances and other conditions of appointment, disqualifications for being an Adviser, filling up of casual vacancy in the office of the Adviser, the meetings of the Board of Advisers, vacation and resignation of office of the Advisers, shall be such as may be specified in the Scheme made by the Central Government.
